stemHtml: Performance Class A, take-off. In comparison to a conventional take-off, the improved climb take-off results in a…

options.a: Reduced V<sub>1</sub> to get an earlier lift-off which leads to more obstacle clearance.
options.b: Reduced flap setting to enhance the climb performance.
options.c: Higher flap setting to enhance the climb performance.
options.d: Higher V<sub>1</sub> and more take-off distance required.
